description.description: [Opt In](/docs/inputoutput-options). The description of the team.
description.example: All developers should be members of this team.

html_description.description: [Opt In](/docs/inputoutput-options). The description of the team with formatting as HTML.
html_description.example: All developers should be members of this team.

allOf.description: A *workspace* is the highest-level organizational unit in Asana. All projects and tasks have an associated workspace.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

allOf.description: The organization/workspace the team belongs to.

permalink_url.description: A url that points directly to the object within Asana.

visibility.description: The visibility of the team to users in the same organization

edit_team_name_or_description_access_lev.description: Controls who can edit team name and description

edit_team_visibility_or_trash_team_acces.description: Controls who can edit team visibility and trash teams

member_invite_management_access_level.description: Controls who can accept or deny member invites for a given team

guest_invite_management_access_level.description: Controls who can accept or deny guest invites for a given team

join_request_management_access_level.description: Controls who can accept or deny join team requests for a Membership by Request team. This field can only be updated when the team's `visibility` field is `request_to_join`.

team_member_removal_access_level.description: Controls who can remove team members

team_content_management_access_level.description: Controls who can create and share content with the team

endorsed.description: Whether the team has been endorsed

custom_field_settings.description: Array of Custom Field Settings applied to the team.

allOf.description: *Deprecated: new integrations should prefer the `parent` field.* The id of the project that this custom field settings refers to.

is_important.description: `is_important` is used in the Asana web application to determine if this custom field is displayed in the list/grid view of a project or portfolio.

allOf.description: The parent to which the custom field is applied. This can be a project or portfolio and indicates that the tasks or projects that the parent contains may be given custom field values for this custom field.
The custom field that is applied to the `parent`.
